ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2025 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jul-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for defendant's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:43 a.m. and concluding at 9:59 a.m.

Defendant Tutor Perini Corporation appearing represented by Lucas Peck, Esq., via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Abbett Electric Corporation not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines Mr. Peck regarding facts of the case.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Defendant Tutor Perini Corp, and against Defendant Abbett Electric Corporation re: the indemnity agreement as follows:

Damages: $0
Prejudgment Interest: $0
Attorney Fees: $24,508.00
Costs: $9511.97
Waiting Time Penalty: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $34,019.47

Mr. Peck is to seperate out the costs and prepare a judgment with the revised amounts and submit it to the court for review and approval.

MINI MINUTES: Dept: 505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 9:47:51 a.m. pausing at 9:48:29 a.m. resuming at 9:53:48 a.m., and concluding at 10:26:24 a.m.(D505)

Re: Motion for Default Judgment

Appearances
Lucas Peck, Esq. specially appearing for Cross Complainant Tutor Perini Corporation via Zoom Video Conference.

The Court requires live witness testimony.
Counsel argues as to the witness requirement.
The Court proceeds without witness requirement.

Counsel provides a summary of the case and proof as to the judgment requested.

The Court upon review of the submitted motion papers require more information for the requested judgment.

Cross complainant to submit supplemental filings of the invoices and other support for judgment.

The Court continues this matter to July 23, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 505.

Notice And Motion To Withdraw And Strike Intervenor Travelers Indemnity Company Of Connecticut?S Answer To Tutori Perini Corporation?S Cross-Complaint; Declaration Of Jafer Jaffery
Off Calendar May-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Jaffer Jaffery, Esq. 714-384-6600 The Aguilar Law Group for INTERVENOR TRAVELERS INSURANCE COMPANY.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court voices concerns on cross-complaint and trial date. Mr. Jaffery argues and wishes to be dismissed from the action. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Motion To Withdraw And Strike Intervenor Travelers Indemnity Company Of Connecticut's Answer To Tutori Perini Corporation's Cross-Complaint.

The Court Denies the motion without Prejudice and order Parties to go back to Department 206. Per the register of actions, the matter is on calendar for June 12, 2023 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 206. ***

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
